_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of erythrocyte p55/MPP1 as a binding partner of NF2 tumor suppressor protein/Merlin.

_contextSnippet: The MBP-fusion proteins, MBP-NF2-N, MBP-NF2-C, and the control MBP were expressed in bacteria, and purified by amylose resin affinity chromatography to near homogeneity
details: Successfully expressed MBP-fusion proteins (MBP-NF2-N, MBP-NF2-C) in bacteria and purified to near homogeneity by amylose resin affinity chromatography
